hero.description: Plan your event, invite your guests, manage attendance, share photos and celebrate together — all in one place.

features.title: Everything you need to run a great event
features.description: From planning to celebration — one platform, zero hassle.

attendees.title: Attendee management
attendees.description: Track RSVPs, manage waitlists, and control capacity with ease.

chat.title: Real-time chat
chat.description: Let your guests connect before, during and after the event.

photos.title: Photo gallery
photos.description: Collect and share memories. Guests can upload directly from their phones.

prizes.title: Prizes & giveaways
prizes.description: Run draws and award prizes to keep the energy high all night.

access.title: Flexible access control
access.description: Public events, private invite-only, or link-based access — your choice.

analytics.title: Insights & analytics
analytics.description: See who attended, engagement stats, and post-event summaries.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to your perfect event.

create.title: Create your event
create.description: Fill in the details — title, date, location, cover image, access rules. Takes less than 2 minutes.

share.title: Share the link
share.description: Send your unique event link. Guests can RSVP, join the chat and see the schedule instantly.

enjoy.title: Enjoy together
enjoy.description: During and after the event, everyone shares photos, wins prizes and keeps the vibe going.

cta.title: Ready to create something special?
cta.description: Join thousands of event creators. Free to start, no credit card required.
